title: centella gymnocarpa
intro: Centella gymnocarpa, also known as Marsh Pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Marsh Pennywort include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential neuroprotective and cardiovascular benefits. In herbal preparations, Marsh Pennywort is often used in teas, infusions, and creams to support skin and joint health.
